channel.title: Greek Coffee on Barista At Home
channel.description: Recent content in Greek Coffee on Barista At Home

item.title: What Is Greek Coffee? Briki Brewing, Sugar Levels & Greek Frappé Guide
item.description: Greek coffee is finely ground coffee boiled in a briki and served unfiltered with kaymaki foam. Learn the traditional briki technique, the four sugar levels (sketo to vary glykos), and how to make a Greek frappé.
